textbox.text: I havent had any strategy, but I think most of my rates are either 3 or 5. I never gave 1 and rarely 2 because I wouldn't want to hurt their feelings (I'm pretty sure they're AI generated, and event if not they will never know my answers, but still). When I saw someone attractive, even if they wasn't in my type I would gave them higher grade, because they were unique in this set.
